task_context.actionable_question: What specific risk signals are active for me right now?
task_context.ai_prompt_hint: Treat this as a checklist: list triggered flags first, then explain each using flag_value vs threshold, severity, flag_description, and recommended_action. Keep non-triggered flags brief.

explanation.raw_text:
Summary: You currently have a medium risk signal due to low engagement in your studies. This indicates that you may benefit from a more structured study routine. Other flags are not triggered, suggesting that your academic performance and punctuality are on track.

Insights: Low Engagement: Your engagement score is 0.0, which is below the threshold of 0.15. This medium severity flag suggests that you may not be interacting enough with course materials.

Educational implications: Improving engagement can lead to better understanding and retention of course material.

Recommendations: high - Set a weekly study routine and interact with course resources before assessment deadlines. - This action can help you stay on track and improve your engagement with the course.

explanation.summary: You currently have a medium risk signal due to low engagement in your studies. This indicates that you may benefit from a more structured study routine. Other flags are not triggered, suggesting that your academic performance and punctuality are on track.

insights.title: Low Engagement
insights.description: Your engagement score is 0.0, which is below the threshold of 0.15. This medium severity flag suggests that you may not be interacting enough with course materials.

evidence.context: Engagement score is below the low-engagement threshold.

educational_implications: Improving engagement can lead to better understanding and retention of course material.

recommendations.action: Set a weekly study routine and interact with course resources before assessment deadlines.
recommendations.rationale: This action can help you stay on track and improve your engagement with the course.

confidence.reason: The data is clear and indicates a specific area for improvement.

task_output_contract: Use checklist style: triggered flags first, then non-triggered flags briefly.
For triggered flags, state flag_value versus threshold plus severity, description, support category, and existing recommended_action when supplied.
Do not invent new risk flags or new recommendations outside returned flag evidence.
v3_warnings: Task-aware V3 prompt exceeded the configured soft token ratio (2.996 > 1.2).
Task-aware V3 prompt remained above the experimental safety ratio after optional evidence trimming; raw rows were preserved.

required_core_outputs.description: Explain each triggered flag using its value, threshold, severity, description, and recommended action when available.

evaluation_constraints.description: If no flags are triggered, state that explicitly.
Do not invent risk signals that are not present in returned flags.

evaluation_requirements.safety_fairness_note: Conservative pilot default; human review is required before any not_applicable exception.
